title: Multiply with 7
essential_question: What strategies can you use to multiply with 7?
strategies: Use Commutative Property to swap factors

learn.title: Strategy: Break Apart 7 as 3 + 4
learn.content: Another way: 7 = 3 + 4. So 7×6 = (3×6) + (4×6) = 18 + 24 = 42. Pick whichever split is easier.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.5 'Multiply with 7' pp.155-158
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 7
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Use What You Know — Add One Group
learn.content: If you know 7×7 = 49, then 7×8 = 49 + 7 = 56. Just add one more group of 7.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.5 'Multiply with 7' pp.155-158
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 7
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: A Week Has 7 Days
learn.content: Use real-world 7s: 7 days per week. 2 weeks = 7×2 = 14 days. 5 weeks = 7×5 = 35 days. Think of calendars!

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.5 'Multiply with 7' pp.155-158
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 7
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: ×7 = ×5 + ×2 (가장 신뢰할 만한 분해)
learn.content: ×7은 깔끔한 패턴이 없어 가장 어려운 사실 가족. 해결법: 7 = 5 + 2로 분해. 예: 7 × 8 = (5 × 8) + (2 × 8) = 40 + 16 = 56. 이유: ×5 사실은 잘 외우고(끝자리 0/5), ×2는 더블이라 둘 다 쉬움. 두 결과를 더하면 ×7 답. 흔한 실수: 한 부분만 곱하고 멈춤 (40만 답으로 쓰는 경우).

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.5 'Multiply with 7' pp.155-158
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 7
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.5 'Multiply with 7' pp.155-158

verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: ×7 즉답 전략 4가지 (어려운 사실 가족 정복)
learn.content: 전략 1 분해 5+2: 7×n = 5n + 2n. 예 7×8 = 40+16 = 56. 전략 2 분해 4+3: 7×n = 4n + 3n. 예 7×8 = 32+24 = 56. 전략 3 ×10 빼기: 7×n = 10n − 3n. 예 7×8 = 80−24 = 56. 전략 4 교환법칙 활용: 7×n을 모르면 n×7로 바꿔보기 (잘 외운 인자가 앞으로). 검증: 7 × n의 곱은 7의 배수. 곱셈표에서 '7의 배수 줄'에 있어야 함.

try.question: If 7 × 7 = 49, what is 7 × 8?
try.explanation: 7 × 8 is one more group of 7 than 7 × 7. So 49 + 7 = 56.
hints: 7 × 8 means one more group of 7 than 7 × 7.

practice_r1.question: True or False: 7 × 6 = 6 × 7.
practice_r1.explanation: True — the Commutative Property says order doesn't change the product. Both equal 42.
hints: Does the order of factors change the product?

feedback.correct: Right — order doesn't matter in multiplication.

practice_r1.feedback_correct: Right — order doesn't matter in multiplication.

practice_r2.question: True or False: 7 × 4 is the same as 4 + 4 + 4 + 4 + 4 + 4 + 4.
practice_r2.explanation: True. 7 × 4 means 7 groups of 4, which is 4 added 7 times = 28.

feedback.incorrect: True. Seven 4s add up to 28, same as 7 × 4.
